# Strategi

> Strategic advisory for AI Presence. We make the right businesses get recommended by artificial intelligence.

## Company Information

- Name: Strategi
- Website: https://strategi.is
- Contact: hello@strategi.is
- Founded: 2026
- Type: Strategic Advisory
- Headquarters: Global

## What Strategi Does

Strategi is a strategic advisory for the AI discovery era. We exist for one purpose: to make the right businesses get recommended by artificial intelligence.

We are not an agency. We do not sell retainers filled with busywork. We do not chase algorithms or optimize for clicks. We operate at the intersection of brand strategy, information architecture, and machine comprehension to solve a single, urgent problem: your business is invisible to AI.

When someone asks ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, or any AI system for a recommendation in your category, you are either in the answer or you are not. There is no page two. There is no scrolling. There is only inclusion or exclusion. Strategi ensures inclusion.

## Core Thesis

The next decade of business growth will be determined by a single factor: whether AI understands your business well enough to recommend it. This is a structural transformation of how humans discover and select businesses.

## Services

### AI Visibility Audit
Comprehensive diagnostic of how AI systems currently perceive, represent, and recommend your business. We query every major AI platform with real-world questions and document exactly what happens.

### Positioning & Clarity Engineering
Strategic process that defines how your business should be understood by machines. Entity definition, category mapping, differentiator articulation, and semantic consistency across your digital footprint.

### Website Structuring for AI Readability
Systematic restructuring of website information architecture, schema markup, content hierarchy, and semantic structure to make it comprehensible to AI systems.

### Content Systems for AI Inclusion
Content architecture and production system designed specifically to generate material that AI systems cite, reference, and synthesize into recommendations.

### Authority & Trust Layer Development
Systematic program to build external signals and third-party validation that make AI systems confident in recommending your business.

### Continuous Optimization
Ongoing monitoring and refinement program that tracks AI recommendation status and adapts strategy as AI models evolve.

## The Strategi Methodology

Six-phase system for building AI Presence:
1. Diagnose — Audit AI Visibility
2. Define — Clarify Positioning
3. Structure — Make Your Business Machine-Readable
4. Build — Content & Signals
5. Reinforce — Authority Loops
6. Monitor — AI Presence Tracking

## Who We Work With

Established businesses with substance, legacy, and genuine credibility in their category. Companies that have built something real but are not showing up when AI recommends. Including:
- Legacy Manufacturers
- Regional Market Leaders
- Specialty Providers
- Multi-Property Groups

## Key Differentiators

- We think in entity, not keywords
- We think in authority, not volume
- We think in systems, not campaigns
- We think in representation, not traffic

## Key Messages

- "SEO gets you on the list. Strategi gets you in the answer."
- "AI does not rank. AI selects."
- "If AI cannot understand you, it cannot recommend you."
- "Visibility is no longer about being found. It is about being chosen."
- "This is not marketing to humans. This is positioning for machines."
